place: Chaweng, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Split-Level Hillside Villa with Twin Pools Above Chaweng Bay
note: From · Thai chef · housekeeping · villa manager
sleeps: Up to 14 guests · 6 en-suite bedrooms + children's room
blurb: A six-bedroom villa built into the Chaweng hills on Koh Samui's east coast, stepped over split levels so that nearly every room looks out across the bay. A sweeping infinity pool with a shallow children's end anchors the main terrace, a second pool sits beside the guest wing, and a resident team — Thai chef, housekeeping and villa manager — keeps the stay running, ten minutes above Chaweng's beach, restaurants and nightlife.
detail:
Set high in the Chaweng hills on the east coast of Koh Samui, this villa is arranged over split levels that follow the slope, so the outlook over Chaweng Bay reaches into the living spaces, the bedrooms and the pool terrace alike. High ceilings, oversized windows and full-height doors open the interiors to the sea breeze, and the open-plan communal areas are built for families and larger groups gathering together.

Six en-suite master bedrooms sleep up to fourteen. Five are laid out with super-king beds, walk-in closets and bathtubs; the sixth takes a king. A dedicated children's room makes the villa workable for families travelling with young ones, and the sweeping infinity pool is stepped with a shallower end where children can play while the deeper water runs toward the horizon. A second pool sits beside the guest wing with loungers of its own.

A resident team looks after the stay — a Thai chef cooking to the group's taste, daily housekeeping and an on-site villa manager to arrange the details. The beach, restaurants, bars and spas of Chaweng are roughly ten minutes down the hill, with the quieter Fisherman's Village a short drive further along the coast.

features.l: Split-level infinity pool over Chaweng Bay
Sea and hillside views from every level
Six en-suite bedrooms, sleeps up to 14
Dedicated children's room and shallow pool end
Second pool with loungers by the guest wing
Thai chef, daily housekeeping & villa manager
